metadata.title: Exponent - 超級個體的代幣化融資平台
metadata.description: 讓生產力成為貨幣。基於生產力錨定的代幣化融資平台，幫助超級個體完成業務擴張的資金募集。

hero.title: 讓生產力成為貨幣
hero.subtitle: Exponent - 超級個體的代幣化融資平台
hero.description: 幫助超級銷售、獨立開發者、內容創作者完成業務擴張的資金募集

features.title: 核心概念
features.subtitle: 摒棄純金融博弈，建立基於實際業務營收的價值閉環

tokenGenesis.title: 代幣創世
tokenGenesis.description: 基於實際業務需求的智能發幣，DLP模型自動計算最優融資方案與流動性配比。

incubation.title: 內盤孵化
incubation.description: 15天聯合曲線認購期，價格隨需求動態上升，早期投資者享受價格優勢。

productivity.title: 生產力錨定
productivity.description: 營收確權驅動的價值增長，通過OCR報銷系統確保資金用於實際業務生產。

dlp.title: 動態流動性保護模型 (DLP)
dlp.subtitle: 智能計算融資規模與流動性配比，保護投資者與創始人雙方利益
dlp.hardCapDesc: 包含流動性儲備 + 發售額度
dlp.poolDesc: 畢業時注入 Uniswap 的流動性

suggestedAmount.title: Suggested Funding Amount
suggestedAmount.subtitle: Optimal plan based on DLP model

scripts.superSeller: Quarterly performance push—I just need a short-term cash boost to land this big client. Liquidity protection? No problem, my payback cycle is already short.
scripts.solopreneur: My AI SaaS product is launching soon. I need funds for cloud servers and customer acquisition. The DLP model aligns my interests with investors—let's grow this product together.
scripts.creator: Content creation requires continuous investment, and traffic monetization is unstable. Through tokenized financing, I can turn fans into investors and build my creator economy together.

roleCards.title: 為誰而生
roleCards.subtitle: 不同類型的超級個體適用不同的生產力系數與資金配置策略

superSeller.title: 超級銷售
superSeller.subtitle: Super Seller
superSeller.lpLock: 較少 (更多資金用於業務)
superSeller.description: Your performance is your asset. Every deal builds your reputation, making financing as simple as closing a sale.

solopreneur.title: 獨立開發 / AI
solopreneur.subtitle: Solopreneur
solopreneur.description: One line of code can change the world. We help you transform technical prowess into capital power—focus on creating without compromise.

creator.title: 內容創作者
creator.subtitle: Content Creator
creator.description: Your fans are your moat, your influence is your valuation. Let your community become your strongest backing.

stats.title: 首發進行時
stats.subtitle: We're refining the product with our first cohort of super-individuals. Real platform data will be displayed here after official launch
stats.footnote: *All data represents pre-launch preparation statistics for the first cohort of quality projects. Actual data will be updated in real-time after official launch.

projects.title: 最新項目
projects.subtitle: 探索正在募資中的超級個體項目

preview.title: Join the First Cohort
preview.description: Exponent is seeking ambitious super-individuals. If you need funding to grow your business and are willing to embrace a productivity-anchored value system, we look forward to partnering with you
preview.footnote: *Projects shown are in preparation under an invite-only system. Official investment channels will open after product launch.

role.title: 選擇你的角色
role.description: 選擇最符合你業務類型的角色

requirements.title: 融資需求
requirements.usagePlaceholder: 描述你將如何使用這些資金

superSeller.title: Super Seller
superSeller.feature: Fast cash conversion | Less LP locked, more withdrawal

creator.title: Content Creator
creator.feature: Unstable cash flow | More LP locked
